ui_colors_and_live_apps_d275d611.plan.md
Auto
Built
о¶Ғ
о©ј
Agent Desktop UI вҖ” Colors + Live App View
Goals
1. Richer visual design вҖ” skill-colored accents, preset-specific themes, clearer status hierarchy (beyond current GitHub-dark minimal palette).
2. Live desktop feedback on Run вҖ” while a session is running, show:
вҖў Target app (from planner/computer metadata: Calculator, browser, Cursor)
вҖў Latest frame (screenshot the agent sees: turn-*/click.png, turn-*/screenshot.png, or artifacts/vision_turn_*.png)
вҖў Open windows (from cua-driver list_windows, with target window highlighted)
loop [every 1.5s while running]
POST /api/run
GET /api/sessions/{id}
nodes, target_app, computer.path
GET /api/sessions/{id}/live
find newest frame PNG
list_windows
frame_url, windows, target_pid
GET /api/sessions/{id}/frame
image/png
index.html
ui_server.py
trajectory_dir
cua-driver
Expand to fullscreen
Backend changes вҖ” code/ui_server.py
Extend session payload
In _node_summary / _session_payload, add fields the UI can render without parsing raw graph JSON:
Field
Source
target_app
metadata.app on running/pending computer node, or output.app when complete
target_goal
metadata.goal on computer node
computer.path
already exposed; add turns
New helpers
вҖў _latest_trajectory_dir(sid) вҖ” scan state/sessions/{sid}/computer/trajectory_* for newest dir
вҖў _latest_frame_path(trajectory_dir) вҖ” newest PNG by mtime among:
в—Ұ turn-*/click.png, turn-*/screenshot.png
в—Ұ artifacts/vision_turn_*.png
вҖў _list_desktop_windows() вҖ” thin wrapper around CuaDriverClient().list_windows() (reuse PATH fallback from _probe_cua_driver)
New endpoints
Endpoint
Purpose
GET /api/sessions/{sid}/live
{target_app, target_goal, path, frame_available, frame_turn, windows: [{title, app_name, pid, window_id, is_target}]}
GET /api/sessions/{sid}/frame
Serve latest frame PNG (FileResponse); 404 if none yet
GET /api/desktop/windows
Standalone window list (optional refresh button in UI)
Safety: _safe_session_trajectory(sid, path) ensures resolved paths stay under state/sessions/{sid}/computer/ before serving files.
Tests вҖ” code/tests/test_ui_server.py
вҖў _latest_frame_path picks newest PNG from fixture directory tree
вҖў /api/sessions/{sid}/live returns target_app when graph has computer metadata
вҖў /api/sessions/{sid}/frame returns 404 when no trajectory exists
Frontend changes вҖ” code/static/index.html
Color / layout upgrade (CSS only)
Expand :root tokens and add skill/preset accents:
--skill-planner: #a371f7;
--skill-computer: #39d4d4;
--skill-formatter: #3fb950;
--layer-hotkey: #f0883e;
--layer-electron: #58a6ff;
--layer-vision: #f778ba;
вҖў Header вҖ” subtle gradient background; vision health pill (already in API, not shown in UI yet)
вҖў Preset cards вҖ” left border color by layer (calc_hotkey вҶ’ orange, canvas_vision вҶ’ pink, cursor_electron вҶ’ blue) via data-layer from code/ui/presets.yaml
вҖў Progress table вҖ” skill column gets colored dot/badge; running row pulse animation
вҖў Status pills вҖ” gateway / cua-driver / vision with distinct colors
New "Desktop view" panel (between Progress and Answer)
в”Ңв”Җ Desktop view в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ Target: [browser]  Path: vision  Turn: 2           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ң Open windows в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  live screenshot в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ в—Ҹ canvas_only - Comet     в”Ӯ в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в”Ӯ  (img #live-frame)в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ   Agent Desktop UI      в”Ӯ в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в”Ӯ

вҖў Panel visible when status === "running" or when computer data exists
вҖў pollSession() also calls /api/sessions/{sid}/live and sets #live-frame.src = .../frame?t={mtime} to bust cache
вҖў Window list: highlight row where is_target or title matches target_app
вҖў Show placeholder ("Waiting for computer skillвҖҰ" / "No frame yet") before first screenshot
Presets YAML вҖ” code/ui/presets.yaml
Add optional layer field per preset for card styling:
- id: calc_hotkey
  layer: hotkey
- id: canvas_vision
  layer: vision
- id: cursor_electron
  layer: electron
Expose via existing GET /api/presets (no API shape break).
What you will see after implementation
When
UI behavior
Click Run
Progress table + Desktop view panel opens
Planner completes
Target app chip appears (browser, Calculator, etc.)
Computer skill running
Screenshot updates each poll; window list shows Comet/Cursor/Calculator with target highlighted
Complete
Final frame + path/result remain visible; polling stops
Out of scope (kept simple)
вҖў True video stream / WebRTC of desktop
вҖў Clicking windows in the UI to change target
вҖў Separate CSS file or build step (stay single-file index.html per current pattern)
Verification
1. Restart UI: cd code; .\run_ui.ps1
2. Run Canvas preset вҖ” Desktop view should show canvas_only window highlighted and updating screenshot
3. Run Calculator preset вҖ” target Calculator, hotkey path, no vision frame until calc window captured
4. pytest tests/test_ui_server.py -q

PermissionError: [WinError 5] Access is denied: 'C:\\Users\\Padmanabh\\OneDrive\\Documents\\S10_Comp_Desktop\\code\\state\\sessions\\ui-d6f2e575\\graph.json.tmp' -> 'C:\\Users\\Padmanabh\\OneDrive\\Documents\\S10_Comp_Desktop\\code\\state\\sessions\\ui-d6f2e575\\graph.json'
о¶„
пҝј
пҝј
пҝј
Investigating the session graph write path вҖ” this WinError 5 on graph.json.tmpвҶ’ graph.json often comes from OneDrive locking or atomic rename on Windows.
Explored
1 file, 3 searches
Likely a Windows/OneDrive race: the UI polls graph.json while the executor renames the temp file. I'll harden _atomic_write with retries and a safe fallback.

+2
пҝј

пҝј    
"""Write via temp file + replace. Retries on Windows/OneDrive lock races."""
пҝј

пҝј

Run persistence and UI server tests
cd, .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe
Shell command options
$ cd "c:\Users\Padmanabh\OneDrive\Documents\S10_Comp_Desktop\code"; .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest tests/test_persistence.py tests/test_ui_server.py -q 2>&1
......................                                                   [100%]
============================== warnings summary ===============================
.venv\Lib\site-packages\fastapi\testclient.py:1
  C:\Users\Padmanabh\OneDrive\Documents\S10_Comp_Desktop\code\.venv\Lib\site-packages\fastapi\testclient.py:1: StarletteDeprecationWarning: Using `httpx` with `starlette.testclient` is deprecated; install `httpx2` instead.
    from starlette.testclient import TestClient as TestClient  # noqa

-- Docs: https://docs.pytest.org/en/stable/how-to/capture-warnings.html
22 passed, 1 warning in 12.40s
This error comes from a Windows file-lock race: the executor writes graph.jsonvia temp-file rename while the UI (or OneDrive) may have that file open. On Windows, os.replace() fails with Access denied (WinError 5) when the target is locked вҖ” common under OneDrive sync.
Fix (code/persistence.py)
_atomic_write is now more resilient:
1. Unique temp files per write (avoids stale .tmp collisions)
2. Up to 8 retries with backoff on PermissionError / WinError 5
3. Fallback: write directly to graph.json if rename still fails (logs a warning to stderr)
4. Cleanup of temp files in a finally block
All 22 tests pass, including new persistence tests for the retry/fallback behavior.
What to do now
1. Restart the UI (.\run_ui.ps1) and run again.
2. If it still happens often, consider moving sessions out of OneDrive, e.g. set in code/.env:
AGENT_SESSIONS_ROOT=C:\temp\agent-sessions
(That env var isnвҖҷt wired yet вҖ” only mention if we add it; for now the retry fix should be enough.)
3. You can delete the stuck session folder if a run failed mid-write: code\state\sessions\ui-d6f2e575
The run should complete without the PermissionError on graph saves.
